scientific_task: Collect experimentally reported EGFR kinase inhibitor measurements against wild-type and mutant human EGFR variants to compare inhibitor potencies and build predictive benchmarks.

record_definition.one_record: One experimentally reported bioactivity measurement (IC50, Ki, Kd) of a specific small molecule tested against a specific human EGFR variant (wild-type or mutant) from a single literature or database source.
